main_button.description: Configuration for the subscription option radio buttons' appearance. Controls colors for text, background, and promotional elements in both selected and deselected states.

promotional_text_color.description: Color value for the promotional discount text displayed on radio buttons (e.g., savings percentage). Applied to the discount_text view in the radio button layout.

button_color.description: Color value used as the unselected background color for radio buttons. Applied as the default background style when a radio button is not currently selected.

subtitle_color.description: Color value for the radio button's subtitle text. Applied to the secondary text line displayed below the main title in each subscription option radio button.

promotional_subtext_color.description: Color value for the secondary promotional text displayed below the main promotional text on radio buttons.

deselected_text_color.description: Color value applied to all text elements within a radio button when it is in the unselected/deselected state. Overrides other text colors when the button is not selected.

title_color.description: Color value for the radio button's price and subtitle text when the button is in the selected state. Applied to the main pricing label and description text of each subscription option radio button.

cta.description: Configuration for the primary call-to-action purchase button displayed below the radio buttons. Controls the button's title color, background color, subtitle color, and visual style.

button_color.description: Color value for the primary CTA button's background or stroke. When style is FILL, used as a solid background color. When style is STROKE, used as the border stroke color with a white background. Resolved through CascadeColorPackage.

subtitle_color.description: Color value for the primary CTA button's subtitle text. Applied to the subtitle label displayed below the main title on the CTA button.

title_color.description: Color value for the primary CTA button's title text. Resolved through CascadeColorPackage; defaults to PositiveColors.base.default if empty or unresolvable.

style.description: Visual style of the primary CTA button. Serialized as lowercase: "fill" renders a solid background using button_color, "stroke" renders a white background with a 4dp border in button_color, "simple" renders a transparent background with no border and minimal height.

secondary_cta.description: Configuration for an optional secondary call-to-action button displayed alongside the primary CTA. Only shown when the secondary CTA title text is non-empty. Uses the same style and color model as the primary CTA.

button_color.description: Color value for the secondary CTA button's background or stroke, depending on the style property. Resolved through CascadeColorPackage.

subtitle_color.description: Color value for the secondary CTA button's subtitle text displayed below the main title.

title_color.description: Color value for the secondary CTA button's title text. Resolved through CascadeColorPackage.

style.description: Visual style of the secondary CTA button. Serialized as lowercase: "fill" renders a solid background using button_color, "stroke" renders a white background with a border in button_color, "simple" renders a transparent background with no border.

package_info_id.description: Identifier that links this button configuration to a specific subscription package. Used to look up the matching PackageInfo by its id, which provides the package SKU, pricing details, promotional offers, and free trial eligibility for the subscription option.

id.description: Unique identifier for this subscription button configuration. Used to match this button component to the screen layout via ComponentsGenericApiModel.

description_color.description: Color value for the CTA description text. Applied to the descriptionColor property of both the primary CTA and secondary CTA button models. Resolved through the CascadeColorPackage color system.
